model_prompt.paid_model_prompt:
Use the following structured task.
Execution policy: Work autonomously from analysis through validation. Do not ask follow-up questions when a reasonable, low-risk assumption keeps the task moving. Complete implementation, tests, documentation, and backlog synchronization before stopping. Only stop early for a true blocker such as missing permissions, destructive ambiguity, or an unsafe action.
